# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: webapp
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-admin-server
  namespace: webapp
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: webapp
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc-server
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---

    app: inventory-service

    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service

---

metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: user-service

  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-proxy-server
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-server
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: redis-cache
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis-cache
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
# ServerAuthorization: frontend -> api-gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-api-gateway
  namespace: webapp
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: webapp
---
# ServerAuthorization: allow ingress controller to frontend
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: ingress-to-frontend
  namespace: webapp
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx-sa
          namespace: ingress-nginx
---
# ServerAuthorization: frontend admin - only linkerd-viz
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-probe-to-frontend
  namespace: webapp
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: linkerd-viz
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> order-service (HTTP)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: webapp
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> order-service (gRPC)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-order-service-grpc
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: webapp
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> user-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: webapp
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> payment-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-payment-service
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> inventory-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-inventory-service
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> inventory-service (read-only queries)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-inventory-service
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: webapp
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> notification-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-notification-service
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: payment-service -> notification-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-to-notification-service
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> database-proxy
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-database-proxy
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  server:
    name: database-proxy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-to-database-proxy
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  server:
    name: database-proxy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: user-service -> database-proxy
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-to-database-proxy
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  server:
    name: database-proxy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization

  name: inventory-to-database-proxy
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: database-proxy

  server:
    name: database-proxy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: inventory-service-sa
          namespace: backend

# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> cache
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-cache
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: redis-cache
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: user-service -> cache
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-to-cache
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: redis-cache
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: inventory-service -> cache
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-to-cache
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: redis-cache
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: inventory-service-sa
          namespace: backend
---
# ServerAuthorization: api-gateway -> cache (session store)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-cache
  namespace: data
  labels:
    app: redis-cache
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: webapp
---
# Linkerd probes server for all backend services (health checks)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-probe-server
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: linkerd-admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-probe-authz
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-probe-server
  client:
    # Allow unauthenticated kubelet probes
    unauthenticated: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-probe-server
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: linkerd-admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-probe-authz
  namespace: backend
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-probe-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
---

# Service accounts for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: webapp
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-sa
  namespace: webapp
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-sa
  namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service-sa
  namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: backend
